title: EU Energy and Raw Materials Platform - Hydrogen Mechanism: Phase Launched for EU Buyers to Consult Supply Offers
content: The European Commission has Launched the Next Phase of the Hydrogen Mechanism under the EU Energy and Raw Materials Platform, inviting European off-takers to consult and express interest in collected supply offers. Running until March 20, 2026, this phase follows a successful collection period from November 2025 to January 2026, which garnered offers from over 260 projects. The mechanism connects buyers with suppliers of renewable and low-carbon hydrogen, as well as derivatives such as ammonia, methanol, eMethane, and electro-sustainable aviation fuel (eSAF). This initiative aims to decarbonize hard-to-abate industrial sectors while enhancing Europe's competitiveness and energy security. The Commission will provide further details on the process during a webinar scheduled for January 27.
author: Analysts Account
